name: Blueberry Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sprinkle the gelatin over the cold water and stir until completely dissolved.
2. Add blueberries, ground ginger, sugar, lemon juice, and grated lemon rind to the pan.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and cook for 5 minutes or until the fruit is tender. Stir occasionally.
4. Spoon the mixture into sterilized jars and allow it to cool slightly.
5. Refrigerate for several hours or until set. Store in the refrigerator for up to 1 month, or freeze for up to 1 year.
Makes 2 cups. Preparation time: 10 minutes, Cook time: about 5 minutes.
